signals.headline: Solana Overtakes Ethereum in Adjusted Stablecoin Volume for Second Time, Lead Holding with Record Supply Growth | YES |
signals.raw:
Solana Overtakes Ethereum in Adjusted Stablecoin Volume for Second Time, Lead Holding with Record Supply Growth | YES | HIGH confidence** [1]

Solana captured 32.6% of weekly adjusted USD-based stablecoin volume for the two-week period ending April 12, surpassing Ethereum's 27.8%, with its stablecoin supply hitting a record $16.3 billion—up 10.87% in the past week, the fastest among top chains. Th

signals.headline: Bitcoin Surges Above $75,000 on Iran Peace Talk Signals, Lifting Ethereum and Solana | YES | MED confidence** [4]
signals.raw:
Bitcoin Surges Above $75,000 on Iran Peace Talk Signals, Lifting Ethereum and Solana | YES | MED confidence** [4]

Bitcoin climbed 5.9% past $75,000 for the first time since mid-March after Iran signaled resumed U.S. peace talks, with Ethereum up 8.6% to $2,377 and Solana rising 6.3%; this relief rally counters prior Middle East war pressure but faces tests from April 15 tax deadlines, April 22 ce
